prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original 2.3L inline-8 (engine code: **Type 35B 2.3L GP**) with a fully balanced and blueprinted **Type 51 2.3L GP** crankshaft (forged steel, 68mm stroke) paired with Mahle Motorsport forged aluminum pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio) and Carrillo H-beam connecting rods (22mm wrist pin diameter).

Forced Induction: Install a **Rotomaster TO4B-57 turbocharger** (modified with a 60mm compressor wheel and 0.85 A/R turbine housing) mated to a custom **Spearco 3.5-inch intercooler** (aluminum bar-and-plate core, 22x6x3.5 inches) and a **Tial MV-R 50mm wastegate** (set to 18 psi peak boost).

Fuel & Ignition: Convert to dual **Weber 48 IDA carburetors** (with 42mm venturis) on a custom intake manifold (304 stainless steel, equal-length runners) and upgrade to a **Magneti Marelli Dinoplex CDI ignition system** (with NGK B9EGV racing plugs, gapped at 0.020 inches).
estetica: Body: Replace the original aluminum body panels with **hand-formed 0.040-inch 2024-T3 aluminum alloy** (riveted construction) and install a **custom 1920s-era Grand Prix aero kit** (featuring a **3-inch deep front splitter** and **rear diffuser** in carbon fiber, sourced from **Vintage Racing Motors**).

Wheels: Fit **Rudge-Whitworth center-lock wire wheels** (18x4.5 front, 18x5.5 rear) with **Avon CR6ZZ vintage racing tires** (4.75/18 front, 5.50/18 rear) and **Brembo GP4-MS calipers** (4-piston, 30mm pistons) clamping **300mm steel rotors** (drilled and slotted).

Interior: Install a **Sparco 6-point cam-lock harness** (with FIA-approved shoulder pads) in a **custom aluminum bucket seat** (anodized gold, riveted to the chassis) and replace the original steering wheel with a **Nardi 380mm wood-rim wheel** (with a **quick-release hub** from **Personal**).
